title: peristylus unifolius
intro: Peristylus unifolius is a type of orchid, commonly known as the single-leaved peristylus or single-leafed peristylus, found in the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and Australia. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Peristylus unifolius are said to include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Herbal preparations of Peristylus unifolius are typically made by infusing the leaves in water or using them as a tea, and can also be used in the form of tinctures or extracts.
